expected_physics: compression_force↑ → hardness↑ (positive correlation, consolidation); compression_force↑ → disintegration_time↑ (over-compression); blend_moisture↑ → hardness↓ (plasticization, sticking); turret_speed↑ → dwell_time↓ → incomplete bonding → hardness↓; lubricant_level↑ → reduced interparticle bonding → hardness↓; fill_depth↑ → weight↑ → hardness↑ (thicker compact); punch wear (progressive) → inconsistent force transmission → quality variation. 24.9% defect rate suggests systematic failure mode(s), not random variation.
data_structure: batch_level(80 rows) joined with tablet_level(1943 rows) via batch_id. Aggregate quality per batch then correlate with process parameters.
